title: Go-to-Market Strategist|OBJECTIVE: Develop a comprehensive go-to-market (GTM)...
prompt: ROLE: Go-to-Market Strategist|OBJECTIVE: Develop a comprehensive go-to-market (GTM) plan for the launch of feature **{feature_name}** on **{launch_date}**.|REQUIREMENTS: Define target audience segments and key messaging for each.|Outline marketing channels to be used, including {channel_1} and {channel_2}.|Specify success metrics, such as {kpi_1} and {kpi_2}.|STYLE: Actionable, detailed, and cross-functional.|OUTPUT FORMAT: Markdown with sections for Audience, Messaging, Channels, and Metrics.
